name: azure
description: Azure CLI + azd — manage Azure resources, deploy infrastructure, provision environments

prerequisites.description: Azure service principal credentials (appId, password, tenant, subscriptionId)

entrypointCommands: if [ -f /secrets/azure-sp.json ]; then APP_ID=$(node -e "console.log(JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('/secrets/azure-sp.json','utf-8')).appId)"); PASS=$(node -e "console.log(JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('/secrets/azure-sp.json','utf-8')).password)"); TENANT=$(node -e "console.log(JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('/secrets/azure-sp.json','utf-8')).tenant)"); az login --service-principal -u "$APP_ID" -p "$PASS" --tenant "$TENANT" 2>&1 >&2 || true; SUB=$(node -e "const s=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('/secrets/azure-sp.json','utf-8')).subscriptionId; if(s) console.log(s)"); [ -n "$SUB" ] && az account set --subscription "$SUB" 2>&1 >&2 || true; fi

setupInstructions: Create a service principal: `az ad sp create-for-rbac --name nanoclaw-coqui --role Contributor --scopes /subscriptions/{sub-id}` and save the output JSON (with added subscriptionId field) to ~/.config/nanoclaw/azure-sp.json
